intro: 4 hard problems that drill the Wqs Binary Search pattern — ideal for focused practice sessions.

faqs.question: Why practice hard Wqs Binary Search problems?
faqs.answer: Difficulty-scoped drills lock the pattern before you mix constraints on harder variants.
